event: A religious or civic procession in an industrial town
symbols: procession past the church — communal ritual in industrial life
smoky, grey sky — the grim industrial context framing the procession
description: A painting in muted brown, grey, and ochre tones showing a long procession of small figures marching in a line across the middle ground, some carrying banners or wearing white. They pass before a stone church or chapel. In the foreground, a crowd of spectators in dark clothing watches. Behind the procession, terraced houses and industrial buildings rise under a hazy, smoky sky. Telegraph poles stand at right. The figures are rendered in the simplified, stick-like style characteristic of the artist, small and anonymous against the urban-industrial backdrop.
